name: p2e
description: P2E authoring and execution workflows for Codex, backed by the P2E MCP. Includes bootstrap (new + onboarding modes), add-story, update-story, work-on-next, and sync-labels.

interface.shortDescription: Route P2E story-map work from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use P2E in Codex through a plain-language router and explicit workflow aliases for bootstrap (new + onboarding modes), add-story, update-story, work-on-next, and label reconciliation.
defaultPrompt: Work on the next planned P2E story
Bootstrap a P2E project from this PRD
Onboard this existing repo into P2E
Create a new P2E story from this feature idea
Draft a thick P2E story from this feature idea
